name: timetask
description: Hebrew Task Management System for Software Development Company

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ..
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run setup:db
scripts.setup:db: cd server && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.clean: npm run clean:server && npm run clean:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client

author: Task Management System
